message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Landing CSS added — please re-review">
Luca has addressed your design concerns in commit e55c052. Changes:
- Added `.landing-hero` component with 24rem max-width centered layout (matching auth-form)
- `.landing-hero__cta` styled as full-width primary button with design tokens
- `.landing-hero__alt` with muted small text for "Already have an account? Sign in"
- `prefers-reduced-motion` respected on CTA transition
- All values reference design tokens, no hardcoded values

Please re-review the CSS in `static/css/main.css` and the template in `templates/index.html`, then confirm consent or raise further concerns.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already reviewed the updated code and sent my **CONSENT** to the team lead. Both blocking issues (missing CSS and no centering) are resolved. No further concerns from me.
